creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 183136
Proposed patch for x11-toolkits/scintilla (since 440229 revision)

Patch to update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite ports from 3.7.4 to 3.7.5 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

x11-toolkits/scintilla:
- Update files/patch-makefile

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
